name: UGREEN NASync DXP4800 4-Bay NAS Enclosure - Intel N100 Quad-core CPU - 8GB DDR5 RAM - 2.5GbE Network Port - 4K HDMI - USB-C - USB-A 10Gb/s - Storage Drives Not Included - RAID JBOD/Basic/0/1 - Maximum Storage up to 112TB (DXP4800)
shortName: UGREEN NASync DXP4800 4-Bay NAS Enclosure - Intel N100 Quad-core CPU
description: 4-bay budget-friendly NAS with Intel processor and 2.5GbE connectivity for small business backup and storage.
